1.0.0.en: Initial release. Learn your Gumax ASY-3501-1 remote and control LED spots from Homey. Supports on/off and 6 brightness levels. Physical remote presses are reflected in the Homey device state.
1.0.0.nl: Eerste versie. Leer uw Gumax ASY-3501-1 afstandsbediening in en bedien LED spots vanuit Homey. Ondersteunt aan/uit en 6 helderheidsniveaus. Bediening via de fysieke afstandsbediening wordt weergegeven in de Homey apparaatstatus.
